desc: Samantha is a perfectionist who works hard and has big expectations.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear travels to America's greatest mountain range-the Sierra Nevada. Bear uses his knowledge of American Indian survival techniques to build shelters, calm wild horses, and find food.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls is in Scotland's Cairngorm Mountains where he has to face artic blizzards, use a deer skin for shelter, and trap rabbits to eat.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges, making a bow and arrow, and showing which plants are poisonous.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls demonstrates survival skills in the Australian outback, showing how to avoid sunstroke, find food, and survive dangerous saltwater crocodiles in this harsh environment.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: In Mexico's Copper Canyon Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive by using traditional cave shelters, fishing without lines or nets, and finding scorpions and grubs to eat.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls shows how to survive in Iceland's Artic conditions. Bear demonstrates how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels, and avoid frostbite.

title: Toddlers & Tiaras
desc: In Charleston, West Virginia, beauty pageants demand not only charm but also makeup, style, and confidence, proving that contestants must be cute, polished, and stage-ready to compete.

title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?
desc: The filmmaker portrays the stories of people who unknowingly got married to criminals.

title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
desc: Noor and Marwan, Iraqi American teens from feuding families, fall deeply in love. Despite opposition from Noor's family, their bond grows, challenging traditions and family rivalries.

title: Django Unchained
desc: Freed slave Django teams with a German bounty hunter, becoming a powerful hunter; they rescue Django's wife from a cruel plantation owner who oppresses others.
